name: Nippon Beet Sugar Manufacturing Co.,Ltd.
summary: Nippon Beet Sugar Manufacturing Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells functional products in Japan. The company offers beet sugar, refined sugar, beet molasses, molasses, and liquid sugar; raw, dry, and medicinal yeast; and feed for dairy and beef cattle, as well as beet pulp products. It also manufactures and sells paper cylinders, seeds, oligosaccharides, etc.; and purchases and sells agricultural machines for beets, tobaccos leaves, vegetables, flowers, paddy rice, and timber. In addition, the company offers raffinose, betaine, melibiose, DFAIII, sugar beet seeds, and adjusted peats products. Further, it is involved in real estate leasing business. Nippon Beet Sugar Manufacturing Co., Ltd. was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
